title: Thrown Knockback
description: Gives Snowballs, Eggs, and Ender Pearls the ability to knock players back when they hit them.
body:
This mod brings back a classic Minecraft mechanic by allowing Snowballs, Eggs, and Ender Pearls to knock players back when they hit them.

Perfect for PvP maps, minigames, or just adding some extra interaction to combat.

Works __only on the server side__ — no client-side mod required!
